opportunities.title: Senior Climate Finance Analyst
opportunities.eligibility_notes: Open to Kenya-based applicants; work authorisation required.
opportunities.summary: Lead deal analysis and portfolio monitoring across off-grid energy and climate-adjacent investments in East Africa.

opportunities.title: Credit Risk Associate, Energy Access
opportunities.summary: Support borrowing-base reviews and credit memos for PAYGo solar and productive-use lending clients.

opportunities.title: Country Programme Lead, Climate Adaptation
opportunities.eligibility_notes: Requires eligibility to work in Uganda or sponsorship via GIZ.
opportunities.summary: Direct a multi-country climate adaptation portfolio spanning agriculture and water security.

opportunities.title: AI Data Evaluator (Contract, Finance Domain)
opportunities.summary: Evaluate AI model outputs on finance and credit-analysis tasks for a US-based AI training platform.

opportunities.title: HR Business Partner
opportunities.summary: Partner with a commercial division on talent, performance, and employee-relations matters.

opportunities.title: Front Office Supervisor
opportunities.summary: Oversee front-desk operations and guest experience for a coastal resort property.

opportunities.title: Mandela Washington Fellowship for Young African Leaders
opportunities.eligibility_notes: Open to applicants aged 25-35 from Sub-Saharan Africa with a demonstrated leadership record. Fully funded.
opportunities.summary: A fully-funded U.S. leadership institute and professional development experience for young African leaders across business, civic, and public-management tracks.

opportunities.title: Credit Analyst, Agri-Finance
opportunities.summary: Assess borrower creditworthiness for a solar-powered irrigation asset-financing portfolio.

opportunities.title: Retail Store Supervisor
opportunities.summary: Manage daily store operations, stock levels, and a supervisory team at a large-format retail branch.
